response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC is 0.25 below your own share threshold (0.6); my conservative policy requires maintaining 60% SoC in islanded conditions with sustained load, so I cannot spare 0.5 kWh without risking my own stability—escalate to aggregator coordination instead.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=[].
